Customer Complaint / Query: Customer says order placed 10 days ago hasn't arrived; tracking shows it's stuck at warehouse.
Agent Action: Agent apologises, raises urgent dispatch ticket, and promises delivery within 48 hours with a ?100 voucher.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer received a damaged product — cracked screen on a tablet — and wants an immediate replacement.
Agent Action: Agent logs a replacement request, schedules a reverse pickup for the next day, and confirms replacement dispatch.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer asks about EMI options for a ?45,000 laptop purchase using their bank debit card.
Agent Action: Agent explains that EMI is available only on select credit cards and suggests the customer visit the bank's app. Cannot process directly.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer was charged twice for the same order and wants the duplicate amount refunded urgently.
Agent Action: Agent verifies the double-charge in the system, raises a refund ticket, and informs the customer it will reflect in 5–7 business days.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer received a men's shirt instead of the women's kurta they ordered and is frustrated.
Agent Action: Agent apologises, initiates a return, and places a fresh order for the correct item at no extra cost.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer wants to cancel an order placed an hour ago as they found the product cheaper elsewhere.
Agent Action: Agent processes the cancellation immediately and confirms the refund will be issued to the original payment method.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer asks how long the warranty lasts on an air conditioner and what it covers.
Agent Action: Agent provides partial warranty info (1 year standard) but is unsure about extended coverage; advises customer to check the brand website.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer is upset that a promised same-day delivery did not happen, causing them to miss gifting it at an event.
Agent Action: Agent acknowledges the failure, escalates to the logistics team, and offers a full refund plus a ?200 gift card as compensation.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer's account is locked after three failed login attempts and they cannot access their orders.
Agent Action: Agent verifies identity via OTP, resets the account access, and walks the customer through logging in successfully.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer asks whether a product listed as 'In Stock' can be delivered to a remote pin code in Arunachal Pradesh.
Agent Action: Agent checks the pin code serviceability tool; delivery is not available. Suggests the customer use a third-party courier address.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer received an empty box with no product inside and suspects tampering during delivery.
Agent Action: Agent apologises, flags the case as high priority, escalates to the fraud and logistics team, and promises a resolution call within 24 hours.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer wants to exchange a size M jacket for size L but the product page shows no exchange option.
Agent Action: Agent manually raises an exchange request, confirms stock availability for size L, and schedules a pickup.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer complains that a cashback offer shown at checkout was not applied to their final bill.
Agent Action: Agent reviews the order but cannot apply cashback retroactively; advises the customer to raise a written complaint via email for review.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer's prepaid order was cancelled by the system automatically without their request and they want to know why.
Agent Action: Agent investigates and finds a payment gateway timeout caused the auto-cancellation; helps re-place the order at the same price.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer wants to know the return policy for perishable grocery items received in poor condition.
Agent Action: Agent informs that perishables have a 24-hour return window with photo proof; guides the customer to upload images via the app.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer is calling for the third time about the same unresolved complaint regarding a faulty mixer grinder.
Agent Action: Agent apologises for repeated follow-ups, escalates to a senior supervisor, and arranges a technician visit within 48 hours.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer asks if they can use two discount coupons together on a single order during a sale event.
Agent Action: Agent checks the coupon policy — only one coupon is allowed per order. Explains the policy clearly but the customer remains dissatisfied.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer did not receive an invoice for a business purchase and needs it for GST filing.
Agent Action: Agent retrieves the invoice from the system, re-sends it to the registered email, and confirms receipt during the call.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer complains the product description on the website was misleading — the TV listed as 55 inches is actually 50 inches.
Agent Action: Agent acknowledges the discrepancy, escalates to the catalogue team, and offers the customer a return or a ?500 adjustment.

Customer Complaint / Query: Customer asks about the status of a refund they were told would arrive in 7 days — it has been 12 days.
Agent Action: Agent checks the refund status, finds it is still processing due to a bank delay, and provides the reference number for the customer to follow up with the bank.
